description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push events to any branch and tags matching v*. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment, checking out the repository with submodules and a full fetch depth. It should then determine if the push is for a tag or not, extracting version information. The workflow should build algorithms and OpenHashTab using PowerShell scripts, create an installer with version information, upload the installer as an artifact, and if the push is for a tag, create a GitHub release with the installer and symbols.
